fields.Name: Agent Run Sweep
fields.Description: Force-fails AI agent runs left in 'Running' after their owning process died or its terminal-state write failed. This is an optional, operator-driven layer over the always-on in-process watchdog sweep: create a Scheduled Job of this type with a cron expression to also record each sweep as a Scheduled Job Run (with the orphan count) and raise notifications. Optional Configuration: { "StaleThresholdMinutes": <number> }.
